project: Smoothrevenue.com — Elite Claude Partner Implementation Firm
tagline: The Execution Layer for Claude at Enterprise Scale

stories.title: Project scaffold — HTML/CSS foundation
stories.description: Create the pure HTML/CSS/JS foundation for smoothrevenue.com. Dark institutional elegance. No frameworks. No Tailwind. Custom CSS properties for all design tokens. Responsive 375px → 1440px.
acceptance_criteria: index.html with full HTML5 structure (nav, hero, services, methodology, social proof, case studies, FAQ, lead form, footer)
styles.css with CSS custom properties for ALL design tokens from taste.md
app.js with i18n EN/ES system
Fonts loaded from Google Fonts (Sora, Inter, JetBrains Mono)
No Tailwind, no Bootstrap, no CSS frameworks
All text content specific — no generic copy
JSON-LD Organization schema in <head>
ruff check . → 0 errors

stories.title: Navigation bar (sticky)
stories.description: Sticky nav with backdrop blur. Logo left, links center, language toggle + CTA right. Mobile hamburger with full-screen overlay.
acceptance_criteria: Sticky: backdrop-filter: blur(12px) + bg rgba(10,10,11,0.85) on scroll
All nav links navigate to correct sections (#services, #methodology, etc.)
Mobile: hamburger icon → full-screen overlay drawer
Active section: orange underline indicator
EN/ES toggle works — nav text changes
Keyboard navigation works (Tab through all items)

stories.title: Hero section
stories.description: Full-viewport hero. H1 + H2 + dual CTA + trust badges. Subtle animated dot grid background. The most important section — must convey authority.
acceptance_criteria: H1: 'The Execution Layer for Claude at Enterprise Scale'
H2: 'We implement. We operationalize. We deliver revenue from your AI investments.'
CTA 1 (orange): 'Schedule Architecture Review' → #contact
CTA 2 (ghost): 'View Case Studies' → #case-studies
Trust badges: Claude Partner Network + AWS Partner + Google Cloud AI Partner (SVG)
Background: subtle animated dot grid (opacity 0.04)
Staggered fade-in animation on page load
Responsive: stacks correctly at 375px, 768px, 1440px

stories.title: Logo cloud section
stories.description: Asymmetric grid of enterprise-style logos. Grayscale, opacity 0.4. Auto-scrolling marquee on mobile.
acceptance_criteria: 8-10 enterprise-style SVG logos (grayscale, opacity 0.4)
Responsive: 2 columns on mobile, full grid on desktop
Marquee animation on mobile
No generic stock images

stories.title: Services matrix (bento grid)
stories.description: 6 service cards in asymmetric bento layout. Each card: Lucide icon (orange) + title + description + subtle arrow link. Glass card styling.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 services from taste.md with unique specific descriptions
Lucide inline SVG icons (orange) — no CDN, no emoji
Bento asymmetric layout — not a uniform grid
Glass card styling: backdrop-filter blur, border glow on hover
Hover: translateY(-2px) + border-glow + enhanced shadow
No generic 'We help companies...' copy

stories.title: Methodology section
stories.description: Horizontal 5-step timeline with connector line. Each step: title + duration + description. Scroll-triggered animations.
acceptance_criteria: 5 steps: Discovery, Architecture, Development, Rollout, Optimization
Connector line between steps (CSS border or SVG)
Each step: title + duration + 1-sentence description
Scroll-triggered fade-in animation (staggered)
Responsive: horizontal on desktop, vertical on mobile

stories.title: Social proof section
stories.description: 2-3 testimonials with real job titles, specific metrics, geometric avatar patterns. Not stock photos.
acceptance_criteria: 2-3 testimonials with job titles (CTO, VP Engineering, Head of AI)
Specific metrics: 'reduced deployment time by 67%' — not vague
Geometric pattern avatars (not photos)
Company context: 'Fortune 500 financial services firm' or similar
Card styling: glass card with hover effects

stories.title: Case studies section
stories.description: 2 case studies. Each: Problem → Solution → Impact with metrics. JSON-LD TechArticle + CaseStudy schema.
acceptance_criteria: 2 case studies with Problem / Solution / Impact structure
Specific metrics in Impact section
TechArticle + CaseStudy JSON-LD schema in <head>
CTA to full case study
Card styling consistent with services section

stories.title: FAQ accordion
stories.description: 8 real objection-handling FAQ questions using <details>/<summary>. Custom chevron animation. FAQPage JSON-LD schema.
acceptance_criteria: All 8 questions from taste.md (real objections, not strawman)
<details>/<summary> element — no JS framework
Custom Lucide ChevronDown SVG (rotates 180° when open)
max-height transition 300ms ease
FAQPage JSON-LD schema in <head>
No placeholder or generic questions

stories.title: Lead capture form (10 fields)
stories.description: High-friction 10-field qualification form. All fields required except phone. Inline validation. Success message on submit.
acceptance_criteria: All 10 fields from taste.md (company, industry, size, AI maturity, budget, use case, timeline, email, phone)
Industry dropdown: Financial Services, Manufacturing, Retail/Logistics, Healthcare, Energy, Other
AI maturity: visual 1-5 scale with labels
Work email: required, email format validation
Primary use case: textarea, 200 char minimum
Error states: red border + error message below
On submit: 'We'll review your submission and respond within 24 hours.'
No 'name + email + message' — this is enterprise B2B

stories.title: Final CTA section
stories.description: Final push before footer. Compelling headline + orange CTA button.
acceptance_criteria: H2: 'Ready to stop experimenting and start executing?'
CTA: 'Schedule a no-commitment Architecture Review' (orange)
Centered, generous whitespace
Background slightly elevated from page bg

stories.title: Footer
stories.description: Footer with logo, nav links, certification badges, LinkedIn, legal links, copyright.
acceptance_criteria: Logo + tagline
Navigation links (Services, Methodology, Case Studies, FAQ)
Claude Partner Network certification badge
LinkedIn link (required)
Legal links (Privacy, Terms, Impressum)
Copyright line
Dark background slightly different from page

stories.title: Legal pages (Terms, Privacy, Impressum)
stories.description: Three standalone legal pages. GDPR-compliant privacy policy. Enterprise consulting terms. German-style impressum.
acceptance_criteria: terms.html: Terms of service for enterprise consulting
privacy.html: GDPR-compliant privacy policy
impressum.html: Legal notice (company info, registration, VAT)
All three linked from footer
Consistent styling with main site
No Lorem ipsum — real legal language

stories.title: llms.txt
stories.description: Plain text AI-readable descriptor at root. Describes the site semantically for AI agents and crawlers.
acceptance_criteria: Exists at root: llms.txt
Plain text, semantic directives for AI agents
Describes: what the site is, what it offers, who it's for
No marketing fluff — factual description

stories.title: Final verification
stories.description: Full quality checklist pass. All sections review. i18n fully working. No console errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 15 stories complete
i18n toggle: ALL visible text changes EN ↔ ES
All internal links navigate correctly
All external resources (fonts) return HTTP 200
No placeholder content anywhere
No console errors
WCAG 2.1 AA: 4.5:1 contrast, keyboard nav
prefers-reduced-motion: animations disabled when set
JSON-LD schemas valid (Organization, FAQPage, TechArticle, CaseStudy)
ruff check . → 0 errors

stories.title: Privacy policy page (GDPR)
stories.description: Create privacy.html at project root — GDPR-compliant privacy policy for enterprise B2B consulting firm Smoothrevenue. Link from footer under legal links. Match styles.css design system. No Lorem ipsum.
acceptance_criteria: privacy.html exists at project root
GDPR-compliant content: data controller info, processing basis, data subject rights, retention periods, contact details
Linked from footer navigation under legal section
Consistent styling with main site (same CSS classes as terms.html)
Real policy language — not placeholder or generated boilerplate

stories.title: Impressum page (German legal notice)
stories.description: Create impressum.html at project root — German-style legal notice for Smoothrevenue enterprise consulting. Company name, registration court, VAT ID, managing director, address. Linked from footer.
acceptance_criteria: impressum.html exists at project root
Content: company legal name, registered office, commercial register entry, VAT ID (USt-IdNr), managing director, contact email
Linked from footer under legal section
Consistent styling with main site (same CSS classes as terms.html)

stories.title: llms.txt — AI-readable descriptor
stories.description: Create llms.txt at project root. Plain text semantic descriptor for AI agents and crawlers. Describes what the site is, who it's for, what services are offered. No marketing language.
acceptance_criteria: llms.txt exists at project root
Describes: Smoothrevenue is an enterprise Claude implementation firm
Lists the 6 core services offered
States target audience: Fortune 500, regulated industries (finance, healthcare, logistics)
Plain text format, no HTML, no marketing fluff

stories.title: Spanish i18n — full ES translations
stories.description: Create i18n_es.json with complete Spanish translations for ALL data-i18n keys in index.html. Then update app.js to include the ES translations in the translations object. Verify the EN/ES toggle changes every visible text element.
acceptance_criteria: i18n_es.json exists and has every key from i18n_en.json translated to Spanish
app.js has the full ES translations object merged into translations.en/es structure
Toggle to ES changes: nav links, hero text, services titles and descriptions, methodology steps, FAQ questions and answers, form labels, footer links
No hardcoded English text visible when ES is selected
Run _check_i18n_full.py to verify completeness
